Pitstop Valet
Professional mobile car valeting services across Essex, UK.
Trusted since 1994. Based in Billericay.

Services:
- Exterior Wash (from £15)
- Bronze Valet (from £20)
- Silver Valet (from £25)
- Silver Valet Plus (from £28)
- Gold Valet (from £35)
- Platinum Valet (from £60)
- Full Showroom Valet Deep Clean (from £130)
- Extras: Polymer Spray Sealant, Element Hybrid Wax, Wet Vac, Leather Treatment, Wheel Cleaning, Bumper & Trim Sheening

Contact:
Phone: 07780 660 282
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/447780660282
Location: Billericay, Essex
Hours: Mon-Fri 9am-6pm, Sat 9am-5pm

Coverage: Most Essex areas including Billericay, Brentwood, Chelmsford, Basildon, Wickford, Romford, Southend. Mileage fees may apply.

Policies: Cancellations made 48 hours or less before appointment subject to full charge.
